programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL
programme.desc: To cross the gator-filled swamp, Rylie, Matt and Ryan engineer an epic 50-foot bridge in a desperate attempt for resources; harassed by a black bear, Jeff and Steven must abandon their camp; EJ stalks a gator that has been stealing his fish.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars
programme.desc: An eye-popping decision, bordering on reckless, puts a survivalist's challenge at risk; two camps go head-to-head when one team sabotages the other's hunt.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL
programme.desc: Sub-freezing temperatures descend on the swamp, putting two survivalists on the brink. Rylie finally resolves lingering resentment from a past challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL
programme.desc: Days from the end of their 60-day challenge, the remaining survivalists join forces against the frigid swamp.

programme.title: Mud Madness
programme.desc: Competitors strap in for the fall mud circuit in the gritty underground world of mud racing; with big money on the line, no one is holding back.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine
programme.desc: Tensions mount when Dave and Jason clash on strategies to stay on the gold; problems with the new wash plant put Chris in a vulnerable position.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: Tickle makes tariff-free apple brandy to help resolve the shortage of American liquor on Canadian shelves; Mike and Jerry learn they're wanted men; Josh discovers the source of industrial ethanol that's fueling a glut of fake moonshine across Appalachia.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today
programme.desc: George sends Greg to the World of Innovation to explore the cutting-edge evolution of cardiac medicine, tracing the journey from invasive open-chest surgeries to the revolutionary pulsed-field ablation system.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Captain Scott Walker heads out to Hawks Cay to chase swordfish with his friend, retired WWE wrestler Travis Tomko.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor fish out of Hawks Cay Resort for tarpon, permit, bonefish, redfish and more in the shallow waters of the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Host Dan Cabela examines how the regulated hunting of ibex in the remote mountains of Türkiye has helped protect large areas for wildlife and fund local conservation initiatives.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Tony guns for over 1,000 ounces in one week. Parker buys a new toy to open even more ground. Rick's crew burns through pay following a hot streak.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: Freddy and Juan find a struggling miner who put his entire life savings into 288 claims in Arizona to create a legacy for his grandson; as temperatures soar, Freddy and Juan race to fix the miner's Franken-built wash plant and recover life-changing gold.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: In the largest hoard he's ever tackled, Matt must find rare military plane parts, vintage records and a hidden jewelry cache to have a shot at making a profit; he brings in heavy equipment to clear the property and dig for big-ticket items.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.sub-title: On a Mission for G.I. Dough
programme.desc: Matt and his troops head to the Pacific Northwest to search a three-barn hoard loaded with U.S. military treasures, including Willy's Jeeps and uniforms; a biohazard mess hides first-generation computers and video equipment at a second location.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: Matt tackles a dangerous, ten-acre hoard in the Pennsylvania woods to hunt high-value guns and ammo; the old-school machinist's property is packed with heavy equipment and scrap metal, but $25,000 worth of precious metal could make a bet pay off.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: In a house packed with oddities, Matt finds megalodon teeth, tribal masks and Civil War bullets; the team struggles to make the kitchen functional again; after low-ball offers, Matt scrambles and lands his biggest payday yet.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Crippled by injuries and toxic frogs, an adrenaline junkie and a self-proclaimed renaissance redneck must dig deep to try to endure 21 days in Colombia.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A circus performer and an avid hunter take on 14 days in the untamed jungle of Tobago; an injury threatens their challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: An ICU nurse and a banker attempt a 14-day fan challenge in the rugged Mexican jungle; as food becomes scarce, they question their will and skill to make it to the end.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A former member of the Amish and an Australian fitness coach attempt to survive 21 days together in the harsh Colombian jungle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Haunted by their previous tap-outs, two survivalists seek redemption in Thailand's steep highland jungle; relentless monsoon rains, lack of fire and the threat of trench foot threaten to end their 21 days early once again.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: For the first time ever, two survivalists are forced to spend the first night of their 21-day challenge completely alone in Botswana's, Okavango Delta; raging storms, swarming mosquitoes, and starvation push them both to the brink.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: Matt is shocked when clients reveal a Pioneer Village that's become a ghost town after three decades of abandonment; Matt hunts for a rare Colt prototype and a Babe Ruth autograph rumored to be on a hot dog wrapper; a vintage Levi's find draws big money.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: A massive seven-acre, snow-covered hoard pushes Matt to the brink; when it takes the team a full day just to unclog the driveway, Matt's deep in the red; to clear the stairs, they toss 500 pounds of trash and hunt for a lost gold nugget on the top floor.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: All-star survivalists Wes and Suzänne take on Ecuador's relentless rainforest; aggressive pumas, venomous snakes and constant storms make every step dangerous and even these veterans are not prepared for the shocking news that shakes their challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: For the first time ever, two survivalists are forced to spend the first night of their 21-day challenge completely alone in Botswana's, Okavango Delta; raging storms, swarming mosquitoes, and starvation push them both to the brink.

programme.title: Expedition From Hell: The Lost Tapes
programme.sub-title: I'm Gonna Die on This Mountain
programme.desc: A perilous bridge crossing exposes Mickey's crusade for good film footage before the team heads deep into the Eastern Andes; Mickey claims to have sent a team member who broke down back to civilization, but team members are unable to find him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine
programme.desc: With the team struggling, Dave's business partner arrives at the claim to observe the operation; his presence creates tension when he identifies one of the miners as the weak link.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season, dubbed the holy day for game wardens; Wardens Inman and Eddins investigate the illegal shooting of two deer; Wardens Stapleton and McGee swap out bass in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: During deer hunting season, Wardens Gould and Scott respond to a call about finding carcasses on private property; a horse owner's home is peppered with stray bullets, while hunters are questioned about hunting illegally.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Confronting a suspected duck and goose poacher; monitoring an injured deer running along a highway; a man is arrested after confessing to poaching a deer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Warden Cummings deals with an angry man who blew a stop sign; Warden Boone helps chase a trio of armed robbers on the run; Warden Inman investigates a group of suspected deer hunters for trespassing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: In Llano County, a jet skier's life is spared after an explosion on the water; when a man fakes his own death, Warden Herchman and Stapleton join forces to track him down; a man is found trespassing while fishing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: In Liberty County, Warden Jake Noxon investigates a family for illegally keeping a pet deer; an alligator roams a garage; Warden Mike Boone joins forces with local police to track down armed suspects after a robbery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: Behind the walls of Clayton County Jail, deteriorating infrastructure creates dangerous conditions for both inmates and staff.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: Caddo Parish Correctional Center is struggling with a staffing shortage, the inmates outnumber the deputies by 180 to one; to ensure the safety of both inmates and staff alike, the Emergency Response Team springs into action.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: Virginia Beach is a party town with a vibrant nightlife, making its Correctional Center one of the busiest city jails in the state. Here, some inmates arrive to go on vacation, then leave on probation -- and return on a violation.
